This is a generated React component named `ctf-cta`, part of the marketing webapp template built with Next.js. As a generated artifact, it is produced from a corresponding content schema definition rather than authored by hand directly, following the pattern used across this codebase for typed content-driven components.

The component relies on the `page-link` module, pulling in the `PageLinkFieldsFragment` type and its associated `PageLinkFieldsFragmentDoc` GraphQL document. This suggests that the CTA (call-to-action) component includes a link target as part of its content structure, allowing it to reference and render page link data — such as a destination page — consistently with how links are modeled elsewhere in the template.

# Relations

- [Page Link.Generated](page-link.generated.md) — Uses page link fields to define the CTA's link target {kind: sync}
